About

Specialist Care.
Exceptional Results.

I am a specialist Prosthodontist and Implantologist currently consulting in Mumbai, with a passion for transforming lives through confident, beautiful smiles. My practice is built around the most complex and rewarding cases in dentistry.

I completed my Masters in Prosthodontics in 2020 from Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences, Bengaluru, and hold an international Prosthodontic license from Saudi Arabia, with hands-on clinical experience at Al-Flaiw Medical Polyclinic, Saudi Arabia.

"Crafting Smiles. Creating Confidence. One patient at a time."
— Dr. Asad Mehmood · Clinical Philosophy
Minimally Invasive
Preserving natural tooth structure. Maximum results, minimum intervention.
Esthetics First
Every restoration designed for natural, harmonious beauty.
Innovation Driven
Latest patented techniques in implantology and digital dentistry.
Patient Centred
Every treatment plan built around the individual patient's needs.
Areas of Expertise

Specialist
Services

Comprehensive Prosthodontic care delivered with precision and artistry. Each treatment is designed around your unique clinical needs and aesthetic goals.

01
Esthetic Smile Makeovers
Complete smile transformation combining art and science. Color, shape, alignment and harmony using the latest esthetic techniques.
02
Full Mouth Rehabilitation
Complete restorative approach addressing teeth, gums, bite and jaw function. Ideal for extensive wear, multiple missing teeth or failing restorations.
03
Dental Implants
Permanent tooth replacement using the latest patented implant techniques. Single implants, multiple implants and implant-supported prostheses.
04
Cast Partial Dentures
Precision-fabricated removable partial dentures providing functional and esthetic tooth replacement for patients with multiple missing teeth.
05
Temporomandibular Disorders
Diagnosis and management of jaw joint disorders including chronic jaw pain, clicking, limited mouth opening and bite-related discomfort.
06
Digital Smile Design
Advanced digital planning allowing patients to visualise proposed outcomes before treatment begins. Precision, predictability and patient confidence.
Currently Consulting

Specialist Care
in Mumbai

Based in Mumbai, I offer specialist Prosthodontic consultations for patients seeking expert care in smile makeovers, dental implants, full mouth rehabilitation and TMD management.

Whether you are looking to transform your smile, restore function after tooth loss, or address chronic jaw discomfort — I bring the expertise of a postgraduate specialist to every consultation.

Schedule a Consultation
01
Specialist Consultation
Comprehensive assessment by a qualified MDS Prosthodontist. Thorough diagnosis before any treatment planning.
02
Advanced Treatment Planning
Digital smile design and diagnostic wax-ups. You see your outcome before treatment begins.
03
Complex Case Management
Full mouth rehabilitation, implant prosthetics and TMD management handled with specialist precision.
04
Minimally Invasive Approach
Maximum aesthetic improvement with minimum intervention. Natural tooth structure preserved wherever possible.
